name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Starter Packs foundation
release_notes: Adds a password-gated Shopping List Starter Packs workflow backed by Supabase starter-pack tables, and removes the full curated grocery library from the public app code.
notes: Added Shopping List beta > Starter Packs with an NZ Seasonal Produce starter-pack card.
Added access-code validation using Streamlit secrets, with support for hashed starter-pack codes.
Added Supabase starter-pack tables for curated read-only library rows outside the public GitHub repo.
Starter-pack imports copy selected sections into the user's own Pathmark Sync sheet using merge/update or clean import.
Removed automatic import of the full nutrition/produce starter library from the public app code; fresh sheets now get grocery categories only.
Updated Terms & Privacy and About & Privacy wording to explain optional starter-pack library storage and imports.
